differentials.name: FAT HERNIATION =  omental fat herniating into chest
differentials.raw: FAT HERNIATION =  omental fat herniating into chest

differentials.name: Foramen of Morgagni =  sternocostal triangle mass, R >> L side
differentials.raw: Foramen of Morgagni =  sternocostal triangle mass, R >> L side

differentials.name: Foramen of Bochdalek =  lumbocostal triangle mass, almost always on left
differentials.raw: Foramen of Bochdalek =  lumbocostal triangle mass, almost always on left

differentials.name: Paraesophageal hernia =  perigastric fat through phrenicoesophageal membrane
differentials.raw: Paraesophageal hernia =  perigastric fat through phrenicoesophageal membrane

differentials.name: LIPOMA =  un- / encapsulated fatty tissue with variable amount of fibrous septa
differentials.raw: LIPOMA =  un- / encapsulated fatty tissue with variable amount of fibrous septa

context: CT: √  fat with fine linear densities (= omental vessels) √  smooth + sharply defined boundaries DDx:   liposarcoma, lipoblastoma (infancy), fat-containing teratoma, thymolipoma (inhomogeneous, higher CT numbers, poor demarcation, ± invasion of surrounding structures)
